title: GOLDEN BOY
sourceNotes: 6-episode 1995-96 OVA (Shueisha/KSS), each episode a self-contained job/adventure of Kintaro Oe. Manga by Tatsuya Egawa ran 1992-1997 (complete, 104 chapters, natively numbered Chapter 0-103; this mapping uses sequential position 1-104 to match AniList's total). Only the OVA's first four episodes draw directly from the manga's opening chapters (Lesson 0-4, positions 1-5), matching by title and plot; the manga's Chapter 2 ("A Flower Troubles the Highlands") and Chapter 5 ("No Breaks Blue Sky") were not adapted. Episode 5 has no confirmed manga source and episode 6 is explicitly anime-original per the Golden Boy Wiki. The remaining ~98 manga chapters (the "Study"-numbered chapters onward) were never adapted into the OVA at all.

mappings.arc: Swimming in the Sea of Love (Lesson 4)
Unadapted manga (Lesson 2, Lesson 5, and all Study-numbered chapters)
